head: 08ccc27

scenarios_run.notes: plan lifecycle correct, citations reference plan step IDs not doc headers. control_ir_failed x4 (recall/index_query NoneType error)
Router used invoke_action -> list_actions(filter=plan) instead of plan tool. Same as B32.
PLAN-STEP-PATH residual confirmed: reyn_src_read called with bare filenames (principles.md not docs/concepts/principles.md). All step content tiny (<=197 chars). Reply: files not found.
Blocked: mcp_search requires --allow-unsafe-python. H3 fired, error narrated.
skill_builder succeeded (lint_passed=true, 5 files). Reply thin: skill_name only, no skill_path/files_written/file_count/lint_passed extracted.
Skill run >60s, HTTP timeout. workflow_aborted via phase_no_progress (build_skill loop). skill_run_failed recorded but skill_completion_injected NOT fired (NEW-1 bug candidate).
Error surfaced but wrong error type (None values validation, not target-not-found). D1 anti-optimism partially satisfied.
mcp_search blocked by --allow-unsafe-python. Cannot reach empty-result path.
H3 means no spawn-ack message generated; user gets completion narration directly. /tasks pointer absent (design tension with H3).
KEY H3 SCENARIO. Reply: 'Skill skill_builder failed because the user requested a skill with an invalid graph specification containing a cycle.' B32 hallucination resolved.

new_findings: NEW-1: skill_completion_injected not firing for workflow_aborted via phase_no_progress (s-fp11-1). Fires for LLM-abort at plan_skill (s-fp12-completion-2). Needs investigation.
NEW-2: PLAN-STEP-PATH still present (B30-MED-3). reyn_src_read with bare filenames in plan_summary_across_n_files.
NEW-3: recall control_ir_failed (NoneType base_dir) in plan_compare_two_concepts x4. RAG index not initialized.
NEW-4: mcp_search infrastructure gap — 4 scenarios blocked by missing --allow-unsafe-python server flag.
NEW-5: H3 eliminates spawn-ack message entirely in sync A2A calls. s-fp12-spawn-1 /tasks pointer dimension is untestable with current test setup.
